## What would you like?

<!-- Describe what you want. Be specific - "improve X" is hard to act on; "add Y to Z so that W" is actionable. -->

## Why?

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you consider? Why is this approach better? -->
